brand_style: Premium outdoor / urban-tech / lifestyle backpack brand. Dark navy (#0B1626) and electric mint (#3FFFAB) palette. Modern, clean, aspirational, adventure-ready.

visual_slots.purpose: Primary hero product shot — the single most important image on the site
visual_slots.style_notes: Clean studio shot of the TrailVolt Core Pack in Core Black, shot at a 3/4 angle on a very dark navy background with a subtle mint-tinted glow. Premium, sharp, magazine-quality.
visual_slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Core Pack modular backpack — hero product shot

visual_slots.purpose: Everyday line card image — city / urban commuter context
visual_slots.style_notes: TrailVolt 22L Everyday pack worn by a person commuting in a modern city (Dublin or London aesthetic). Morning light, professional attire, laptop bag energy.
visual_slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Everyday 22L pack in urban commute setting

visual_slots.purpose: Travel line card image — airport / cabin-ready context
visual_slots.style_notes: TrailVolt 30L Travel pack placed in airplane overhead bin or held at an airport gate. Clean, minimal background. Slate or Black colourway. Business traveller energy.
visual_slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Travel 30L pack at airport — IATA cabin-compliant carry-on

visual_slots.purpose: Trail line card image — outdoor / hiking context
visual_slots.style_notes: TrailVolt 28L Trail pack worn on a hiking trail. Lush green Irish or Scottish highland scenery. Active shot, golden hour or dramatic overcast. Forest Green colourway.
visual_slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Trail 28L pack on mountain hiking trail

visual_slots.purpose: Modular system explainer — shows modules attaching to a base pack
visual_slots.style_notes: Flat-lay or isometric overhead shot of Core Black TrailVolt pack surrounded by detached modules (phone holder, power bank, rain cover, shoe compartment, tech organiser). Clean dark navy surface. Labels optional. Very clean, premium editorial style.
visual_slots.alt_text: TrailVolt modular system — base pack with all add-on modules displayed

visual_slots.purpose: Shop product card — Everyday Core Black colourway
visual_slots.style_notes: Clean studio product shot. TrailVolt 22L Everyday pack, Core Black. Front-facing or slight 3/4 angle. White or very light grey background. Premium e-commerce quality.
visual_slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Everyday 22L Core Black

visual_slots.purpose: Shop product card — Everyday Slate Grey colourway
visual_slots.style_notes: Clean studio product shot. TrailVolt 22L Everyday pack, Slate Grey. Same framing as Core Black variant. Neutral background.
visual_slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Everyday 22L Slate Grey

visual_slots.purpose: Shop product card — Everyday Forest Green colourway (limited edition)
visual_slots.style_notes: Clean studio product shot. TrailVolt 22L Everyday pack, Forest Green. Subtle leaf or moss element in background to hint at the outdoors, without overpowering.
visual_slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Everyday 22L Forest Green — Limited Edition

visual_slots.purpose: Shop product card — Travel Core Black colourway
visual_slots.style_notes: Clean studio product shot. TrailVolt 30L Travel pack, Core Black, clamshell open pose or standing upright. Airport gate or clean studio background.
visual_slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Travel 30L Core Black

visual_slots.purpose: Shop product card — Travel Slate Grey colourway
visual_slots.style_notes: Clean studio product shot. TrailVolt 30L Travel pack, Slate Grey. Neutral studio background.
visual_slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Travel 30L Slate Grey

visual_slots.purpose: Shop product card — Travel custom/bespoke configuration lifestyle shot
visual_slots.style_notes: Lifestyle shot showing Travel pack with visible modules attached in an airport or hotel lobby context. Aspirational travel energy.
visual_slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Travel 30L custom configured — lifestyle

visual_slots.purpose: Shop product card — Trail Core Black colourway
visual_slots.style_notes: Clean studio or outdoor product shot. TrailVolt 28L Trail pack, Core Black. Rocky or earthy natural surface. Water droplets or DWR water beading visible on fabric.
visual_slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Trail 28L Core Black

visual_slots.purpose: Shop product card — Trail Slate Grey colourway
visual_slots.style_notes: Clean product shot on natural outdoor surface. Slate Grey colourway against mossy rocks or trail terrain.
visual_slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Trail 28L Slate Grey

visual_slots.purpose: Shop product card — Trail Forest Green colourway
visual_slots.style_notes: Product shot in forest or mountain environment. Forest Green pack camouflages beautifully in natural greenery — use contrast between pack and bright Irish hillside.
visual_slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Trail 28L Forest Green

visual_slots.purpose: Bundle/starter kit promotional banner
visual_slots.style_notes: Flat-lay of a starter bundle — Core Pack plus 3-4 modules arranged aesthetically on a dark surface with soft mint accent lighting. Premium unboxing energy.
visual_slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Starter Bundle — Core Pack with modules

visual_slots.purpose: Founder portrait — Ruslan in the Dublin design studio
visual_slots.style_notes: Portrait of a young male founder (late 20s / early 30s, modern professional look) in a design studio setting. Surrounded by fabric swatches, prototypes, CAD drawings. Candid, authentic, not overly posed. Warm studio lighting with dark navy tones.
visual_slots.alt_text: Ruslan, founder of TrailVolt, in the Dublin design studio

visual_slots.purpose: Founder testing early prototype in Wicklow Mountains
visual_slots.style_notes: Person with an early prototype pack hiking on a green Irish mountain trail. Misty Wicklow Mountains backdrop. Moody, atmospheric, authentic feel. Overcast Irish sky. Candid movement shot.
visual_slots.alt_text: Ruslan testing early TrailVolt prototype in Wicklow Mountains

visual_slots.purpose: TrailVolt prototypes spread on a workshop table — early phase
visual_slots.style_notes: Flat-lay or slight angle shot of a wooden workshop table with early backpack prototypes, fabric samples, zippers, buckles, and hand-written notes. Warm, raw, maker energy. Authentic craftsmanship feeling.
visual_slots.alt_text: TrailVolt early prototypes on workshop table

visual_slots.purpose: Ruslan boarding a flight at Dublin Airport with the Travel 30L prototype
visual_slots.style_notes: Person walking through an airport terminal (Dublin-like) carrying a TrailVolt Travel 30L pack. Slightly motion-blurred background suggesting movement. Modern terminal architecture. Natural daylight from terminal windows.
visual_slots.alt_text: Ruslan at Dublin Airport with Travel 30L prototype

visual_slots.purpose: Current workshop process shot — materials being stitched, quality in progress
visual_slots.style_notes: Professional workshop environment. Close-up or medium shot of ballistic nylon being precision-stitched on an industrial sewing machine, or a finished pack component being inspected. Warm workshop lighting. Quality and craft is the message.
visual_slots.alt_text: TrailVolt workshop — prototype materials and stitching in progress

visual_slots.purpose: Repair programme visual — spare parts, zipper replacements, lifetime care
visual_slots.style_notes: Clean flat-lay or workshop shot of TrailVolt spare parts kit. YKK zipper pulls, Duraflex buckles, fabric patches, small tool kit arranged neatly on a dark surface. Premium, purposeful, anti-disposable energy. Tells the story of longevity.
visual_slots.alt_text: TrailVolt repair kit — spare parts and lifetime repair programme

visual_slots.purpose: Tribe member portrait — Aoife Murphy, Adventure Hiker, Donegal
visual_slots.style_notes: Young Irish woman (late 20s) outdoors on a coastal or mountain trail. Athletic, adventurous look. Wearing TrailVolt Trail 28L. Wild Atlantic Way or Wicklow coastal scenery. Natural light, candid and joyful.
visual_slots.alt_text: Aoife Murphy — Adventure Hiker, Donegal, Ireland, TrailVolt Tribe

visual_slots.purpose: Tribe member portrait — Marco Lazzarini, Digital Nomad, Barcelona
visual_slots.style_notes: Young Italian man (early 30s) at a laptop at a sunny Mediterranean terrace café. TrailVolt Travel 30L visible on the chair or nearby. Bright Barcelona or Lisbon architecture in background. Digital nomad lifestyle aesthetic.
visual_slots.alt_text: Marco Lazzarini — Digital Nomad, Barcelona, TrailVolt Tribe

visual_slots.purpose: Tribe member portrait — Sarah Kim, Product Designer, Dublin
visual_slots.style_notes: Young East Asian woman (late 20s) cycling or walking in urban Dublin. Wearing professional but stylish clothing. TrailVolt Everyday 22L on her back. Modern Dublin streetscape — canals, brick Georgian architecture. Morning commute energy.
visual_slots.alt_text: Sarah Kim — Product Designer, Dublin, TrailVolt Tribe

visual_slots.purpose: Tribe member portrait — Tomás Rivera, Trail Runner, Pamplona
visual_slots.style_notes: Young Spanish man (late 20s) mid-run on a Pyrenees mountain trail. TrailVolt Trail 28L on his back. Dynamic movement, dramatic mountain backdrop, golden hour light. Athletic, determined expression.
visual_slots.alt_text: Tomás Rivera — Trail Runner, Pamplona, TrailVolt Tribe

visual_slots.purpose: Tribe member portrait — Nadia Voronova, Freelance Developer, Amsterdam
visual_slots.style_notes: Young Eastern European woman (late 20s / early 30s) at a canal-side café in Amsterdam. Laptop open, headphones around neck, TrailVolt Everyday or Travel pack. Dutch architecture in background. Focused but relaxed creative freelancer energy.
visual_slots.alt_text: Nadia Voronova — Freelance Developer, Amsterdam, TrailVolt Tribe

visual_slots.purpose: Tribe member portrait — James Thornton, Architect, London
visual_slots.style_notes: Young British man (early 30s) on London Bridge or in a modern architectural setting. Smart-casual attire. TrailVolt Everyday 22L Core Black or Slate. Overcast London sky. Confident, measured, professional aesthetic.
visual_slots.alt_text: James Thornton — Architect, London, TrailVolt Tribe

visual_slots.purpose: UGC-style photo — Aoife at Cliffs of Moher with TrailVolt
visual_slots.style_notes: Square crop. Dramatic Cliffs of Moher coastal scenery. TrailVolt Trail pack visible. Natural, slightly grainy Instagram-style aesthetic. Person arms spread or looking at the horizon.
visual_slots.alt_text: Aoife at Cliffs of Moher with TrailVolt Trail 28L

visual_slots.purpose: UGC-style photo — Marco in Lisbon Airport with Travel pack
visual_slots.style_notes: Square crop. Bright, modern airport terminal. Person sitting with TrailVolt Travel pack between feet or in overhead bin. Lifestyle, real-world, candid feeling.
visual_slots.alt_text: Marco in Lisbon Airport with TrailVolt Travel 30L

visual_slots.purpose: UGC-style photo — Sarah cycling in Dublin with Everyday pack
visual_slots.style_notes: Square crop. Cycling shot in Dublin, blurred background. TrailVolt Everyday 22L on her back. Energetic, urban commuter vibes. Early morning or evening golden light.
visual_slots.alt_text: Sarah cycling in Dublin with TrailVolt Everyday 22L

visual_slots.purpose: UGC-style photo — Tomás on Pyrenees trail
visual_slots.style_notes: Square crop. High-angle shot of trail runner on a rocky Pyrenees path. TrailVolt Trail pack on back. Dramatic rocky landscape, thin mountain air feel. Action / sports photography aesthetic.
visual_slots.alt_text: Tomás on Pyrenees trail with TrailVolt Trail 28L

visual_slots.purpose: UGC-style photo — Nadia at Amsterdam canal café
visual_slots.style_notes: Square crop. Cosy Amsterdam canal-side café. Laptop, coffee, TrailVolt Everyday pack on chair. Warm interior or outdoor terrace. European café lifestyle photography.
visual_slots.alt_text: Nadia at Amsterdam canal café with TrailVolt pack

visual_slots.purpose: UGC-style photo — James at London Bridge
visual_slots.style_notes: Square crop. London Bridge or Southbank area. TrailVolt Everyday Core Black on James's back. Overcast or golden hour London. Architectural, sophisticated framing.
visual_slots.alt_text: James at London Bridge with TrailVolt Everyday 22L

visual_slots.purpose: UGC-style product flat-lay — all modules arranged neatly
visual_slots.style_notes: Square overhead flat-lay. All 8 TrailVolt modules arranged neatly on a dark surface. Mint accent lighting. Product photography meets UGC authenticity. Clean and sharp.
visual_slots.alt_text: TrailVolt modules laid out — full system overview

visual_slots.purpose: UGC-style photo — TrailVolt pack leaning against mountain backdrop
visual_slots.style_notes: Square crop. TrailVolt Trail 28L Forest Green leaning against a boulder or rock face with dramatic mountain landscape behind. No person. Pure pack and landscape. Aspirational gear photography.
visual_slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Trail 28L against mountain backdrop

visual_slots.purpose: UGC-style photo — TrailVolt Travel 30L in airplane overhead bin
visual_slots.style_notes: Square crop. Close-up of TrailVolt Travel 30L Core Black fitting cleanly into an aircraft overhead storage bin. Shows IATA compliance and the pack's organised form factor. Clean, confident, traveller proof.
visual_slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Travel 30L in airplane overhead bin

visual_slots.purpose: Product page hero — Everyday 22L configurator display image
visual_slots.style_notes: Premium studio shot, clean dark or white background. TrailVolt 22L Everyday in Core Black, front-facing. Sharp detail on zippers, fabric texture, module attachment points. Used as the base for colour-switching in the configurator.
visual_slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Everyday 22L — product configurator view

visual_slots.purpose: Product page hero — Travel 30L configurator display image
visual_slots.style_notes: Premium studio shot. TrailVolt 30L Travel in Core Black, front-facing or slight 3/4. Clamshell open detail optional. Shows full-size impression, all access points. Dark background.
visual_slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Travel 30L — product configurator view

visual_slots.purpose: Product page hero — Trail 28L configurator display image
visual_slots.style_notes: Premium studio or light outdoor studio shot. TrailVolt 28L Trail in Core Black, front-facing. Shows padded harness system, DWR-coated fabric, rugged details. Nature-hint background or neutral dark.
visual_slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Trail 28L — product configurator view

visual_slots.purpose: Social preview for the homepage when shared on social media
visual_slots.style_notes: Wide banner: TrailVolt wordmark on left, Core Pack product shot on right, dark navy background, mint accent. 'One Pack. Every Horizon.' tagline. Should feel like a premium magazine ad.
visual_slots.alt_text: TrailVolt — One Pack. Every Horizon. Premium modular backpacks.

visual_slots.purpose: Social preview for the Our Story page
visual_slots.style_notes: Wide banner: founder portrait on left, 'Built Out of Frustration. Perfected by Obsession.' on right. Dark navy background, warm studio lighting. Brand story energy.
visual_slots.alt_text: TrailVolt — Our Story. Built by Ruslan, perfected by obsession.

visual_slots.purpose: Social preview for the Shop page
visual_slots.style_notes: Wide banner showing all three pack lines (Everyday, Travel, Trail) arranged side by side on dark background. 'Shop the Full System' headline feel. Clean and premium.
visual_slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Shop — Everyday, Travel, and Trail pack lines

visual_slots.purpose: Social preview for the Tribe community page
visual_slots.style_notes: Collage-style banner of 3-4 tribe member lifestyle moments. Community, diverse, adventurous energy. TrailVolt wordmark overlaid. '12,000+ Adventurers Worldwide' headline.
visual_slots.alt_text: The TrailVolt Tribe — 12,000+ adventurers worldwide
